narration: Enter chemiosmosis, the process powering ATP, your body's energy currency.

narration: It all happens in mitochondria, where protons flow through a membrane, creating energy.
visual_description: Escalation visual: It all happens in mitochondria, where protons flow through a membrane, creating energy.

narration: This movement generates a gradient, triggering ATP synthase to produce ATP.
